intro.headline: Digital Solutions
intro.subhead: Software, websites, Google Business, and automation for local businesses — scoped in clear tiers with transparent price ranges.

gbpBenefits: Show up in Google Maps and local search when customers are ready to hire
Collect and respond to reviews where prospects compare you to competitors
Publish updates, offers, and photos that stay synced with your social channels
See how customers find and interact with your listing via Insights
Build trust with verified hours, service area, and consistent branding
complexityLadder: W1 Basic — new or refreshed site
W2 Additions — pages, widgets, PDFs, estimators

categories.label: Foundation
categories.subtitle: Local presence setup before you invest in a full web build.

services.title: Google Business + social integration
deliverables: Connect Instagram or Meta accounts to Google Business profiles
Configure cross-posting so social content publishes to GMB Updates
Audit profiles: hours, service area, photos, categories — fix gaps
Set up scheduling for posts across connected accounts
services.problem: Customers search on Maps and Google, but your profile is incomplete and social posts never reach your Business listing.
services.solution: One connected local presence: accurate GMB profiles with social content flowing to Updates automatically.
services.approach: Audit both profiles → connect accounts → configure cross-post rules → hand off a short maintenance checklist.

categories.label: Websites
categories.subtitle: Basic → Additions — combine new sites and edits into two complexity tiers.

services.title: New site or edit / refresh
deliverables: New starter site or refresh of an existing site
Core pages (home, services, contact), responsive layout
Header, footer, colors, and typography aligned to your brand
Mobile-responsive check and before/after walkthrough on delivery
services.problem: You need to be online fast with a credible site, or your current site looks dated and doesn't work on phones.
services.solution: A clean, mobile-ready web presence — launched new or refreshed — without enterprise overhead.
services.approach: Confirm scope (new vs. edit) → apply brand template → ship core pages → review together on delivery.

services.title: Website expansions & interactive tools
deliverables: Additional pages and service or location sections
Embedded widgets (forms, calculators, third-party APIs)
Signable estimate or proposal PDF workflow
Address-based cost or scope estimator with lead capture
Mobile and SEO check on all shipped changes
services.problem: A basic site isn't enough — you need more pages, lead capture, or tools that quote work without phone tag.
services.solution: Targeted additions: content, widgets, e-sign PDFs, and estimators that turn visitors into qualified leads.
services.approach: Prioritize features → build in phases → embed and test on your live platform → document how your team uses each tool.

categories.label: Growth & social
categories.subtitle: Ongoing content that feeds both Instagram and Google Business.

services.title: Social content retainer
deliverables: 8–12 posts per month (seasonal, project highlights, reviews, tips)
All posts cross-published to Google Business Updates
Monthly content calendar sent for approval before the month starts
Rapid-turn posts for time-sensitive events when you provide photos
services.problem: Posting consistently takes time, and when you stop, Maps and social both go quiet.
services.solution: A steady calendar of on-brand posts with GMB cross-publish — you supply photos, we handle copy and scheduling.
services.approach: Align on voice and themes → calendar for approval → schedule and cross-post → monthly metrics check-in.

categories.label: Commerce
categories.subtitle: Advanced tier — after your core site is live.

services.title: Online store
deliverables: Product catalog with categories and variants
Cart, checkout, and basic order notifications
Mobile-friendly shopping experience
Foundational SEO for product and collection pages
services.problem: Customers want to buy online but you're limited to phone orders or a generic marketplace.
services.solution: A branded store on your own site with checkout you control.
services.approach: Catalog structure → platform setup → payments and shipping rules → test orders → launch checklist.

services.title: Restaurant ordering
deliverables: Digital menu with categories, modifiers, and specials
Pickup and/or delivery ordering flow
Order notifications to kitchen or counter staff
Hours, closures, and item availability controls
services.problem: Third-party apps take a large cut and you don't own the customer relationship.
services.solution: Direct ordering on your site — menu, flow, and branding under your control.
services.approach: Menu modeling → order flow UX → payment and notification hooks → staff training on order handling.

categories.label: Automation & GIS
categories.subtitle: AI assistance and map-based tools for service businesses.

services.title: AI chat & workflow automation
deliverables: Website chat widget with guardrails and escalation paths
Lead routing (email, CRM hook, or shared inbox)
Draft helpers for reviews, FAQs, and local posts
Optional maintenance for prompts and knowledge updates
services.problem: After-hours questions go unanswered and your team repeats the same replies on email and chat.
services.solution: AI-assisted chat and drafts that capture leads and speed up routine responses — with humans in the loop.
services.approach: Define allowed topics → wire widget and routing → test with real FAQs → tune prompts from live transcripts.

services.title: GIS & map integrations
deliverables: Service area maps and location finders
Embedded Google Maps or custom map layers
Field or asset overlays for operations teams
Locator widgets tied to address search or territories
services.problem: Customers don't know if you serve their area, and internal teams lack a single map view of coverage or sites.
services.solution: Clear, interactive maps on the site and optional GIS layers for planning and customer self-service.
services.approach: Define geographies or datasets → build embed or layer → validate on mobile → document update process.

lines: Typical starter bundle (F1 + W1): about $450–$900 one-time
Add W2 for interactive tools or G1 for ongoing social — priced separately
Commerce (C1/C2) and maps (M1) scoped after your core site is stable
summary.depositNote: Typical deposit $200–$500 to begin foundation or W1 work; remainder on agreed milestones.

pricingDisclaimer: Ranges are indicative. Final quotes depend on your platform (WordPress, Squarespace, custom, etc.), content readiness, and third-party integrations.
